TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andrej_Kiska, title = Andrej_Kiska, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrej_Kiska} }

S.FORM: == Andrej Kiska == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 2, Andrej Kiska, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Slovakia ta' misuw hya' ga Andrej Kiska, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Kiska htagan beh sa populat. Kiska aring 1985 kawas tehok 2001 kawas msqun hga Mária Kisková. maki sazing laqi nha Andrej Kiska (1986) ru Natália Kisková (1990). 2001 kawas wal mt'alax la. pinqbaqan nya Andrej Kiska tmasuq mqwas biru sa Slovak Technology pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Andrej Kiska hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 1980, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Andrej Kiska == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 2, Andrej Kiska, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Slovakia ta' misuw hya' ga Andrej Kiska, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Kiska htagan beh sa populat. Kiska aring 1985 kawas tehok 2001 kawas msqun hga Mária Kisková. maki sazing laqi nha Andrej Kiska (1986) ru Natália Kisková (1990). 2001 kawas wal mt'alax la. pinqbaqan nya Andrej Kiska tmasuq mqwas biru sa Slovak Technology pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Andrej Kiska hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 1980, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == an*rej kis~ɕka == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, an*rej kis~ɕka, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕlo*akia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa an*rej kis~ɕka, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kis~ɕka ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa populat. kis~ɕka ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ teħok **** kawas~ɕ ms~ɕqun ħɣa m*ria kis~ɕko**. maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi nħa an*rej kis~ɕka (****) ru nat*lia kis~ɕko** (****). **** kawas~ɕ wal mtʔalax la. pinqβaqan nja an*rej kis~ɕka tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕlo*ak teʦ~ʨħnoloɣj pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . mintzjuwaw nja an*rej kis~ɕka ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
